testcase.name: App Component > Initialization Flow > should initialize database, load projects, settings, and check Claude installation

failure.message:
Found multiple elements with the text: Test Project 1 Here are the matching elements: Ignored nodes: comments, script, style [36m

[39m [0mTest Project 1[0m [36m

[39m Ignored nodes: comments, script, style [36m

[39m [0mTest Project 1[0m [36m

[39m (If this is intentional, then use the `*AllBy*` variant of the query (like `queryAllByText`, `getAllByText`, or `findAllByText`)). Ignored nodes: comments, script, style [36m[39m [36m

testcase.failure:
TestingLibraryElementError: Found multiple elements with the text: Test Project 1 Here are the matching elements: Ignored nodes: comments, script, style

Test Project 1

Ignored nodes: comments, script, style

Test Project 1

(If this is intentional, then use the `*AllBy*` variant of the query (like `queryAllByText`, `getAllByText`, or `findAllByText`)). Ignored nodes: comments, script, style

❯ Proxy.waitForWrapper node_modules/@testing-library/react/node_modules/@testing-library/dom/dist/wait-for.js:163:27 ❯ src/App.test.jsx:136:13

testcase.name: App Component > Initialization Flow > should show loading spinner during initialization
App Component > Initialization Flow > should show warning if Claude is not installed
App Component > Search Functionality > should filter projects based on search query with debouncing
App Component > Search Functionality > should search across multiple fields
App Component > Tag Filtering > should filter projects by selected tags
App Component > Tag Filtering > should support multiple tag filters with AND logic
App Component > Tag Filtering > should clear tag filters
App Component > Sort Functionality > should sort projects by name (A-Z)
App Component > Sort Functionality > should sort projects by recently used
App Component > Sort Functionality > should persist sort preference
App Component > Theme Toggle > should toggle between light and dark themes
App Component > Error Handling with Snackbar > should show error when project loading fails
App Component > Error Handling with Snackbar > should show warning for duplicate projects
App Component > Keyboard Navigation > should launch selected project with Enter key
App Component > Keyboard Navigation > should launch with continue flag on Shift+Enter
App Component > Drag and Drop Areas > should show drop overlay on drag over
App Component > Add Project Functionality > should add project through file dialog
App Component > Add Project Functionality > should show loading state while adding
App Component > Delete Dialog Flow > should show confirmation dialog before deleting
App Component > Delete Dialog Flow > should delete project on confirmation
App Component > Delete Dialog Flow > should cancel deletion
ProjectCard > Rendering > renders project name
ProjectCard > Rendering > renders project path
ProjectCard > Rendering > renders all tags
ProjectCard > Rendering > renders notes
ProjectCard > Rendering > renders "No notes yet" when notes are empty
ProjectCard > Rendering > truncates long notes with ellipsis
ProjectCard > Rendering > renders with empty tags array
ProjectCard > Pin/Unpin functionality > shows star border icon when unpinned
ProjectCard > Pin/Unpin functionality > shows filled star icon when pinned
ProjectCard > Pin/Unpin functionality > calls onPin with correct arguments when clicking pin button
ProjectCard > Pin/Unpin functionality > toggles pin state correctly
ProjectCard > Pin/Unpin functionality > shows loading spinner when pin operation is in progress
ProjectCard > Pin/Unpin functionality > disables pin button during loading
ProjectCard > Edit mode > enters edit mode when clicking edit button
ProjectCard > Edit mode > shows save and cancel buttons in edit mode
ProjectCard > Edit mode > focuses name field when entering edit mode
ProjectCard > Edit mode > disables edit button when any operation is loading
ProjectCard > Saving edits > saves edited values correctly
ProjectCard > Saving edits > trims whitespace from tags
ProjectCard > Saving edits > filters out empty tags
ProjectCard > Saving edits > shows loading spinner during save
ProjectCard > Saving edits > disables save/cancel buttons during update
ProjectCard > Canceling edits > reverts changes when canceling
ProjectCard > Canceling edits > exits edit mode when canceling
ProjectCard > Launch functionality > calls onLaunch with project id and continue flag false by default
ProjectCard > Launch functionality > calls onLaunch with continue flag true when checkbox is checked
ProjectCard > Launch functionality > resets continue flag after launch
ProjectCard > Launch functionality > shows loading state during launch
ProjectCard > Launch functionality > has data-launch-btn attribute for keyboard navigation
ProjectCard > Delete functionality > calls onDelete with project id
ProjectCard > Delete functionality > disables delete button when any operation is loading
ProjectCard > Tag click handling > calls onTagClick when clicking a tag
ProjectCard > Tag click handling > makes tags non-clickable when onTagClick is not provided
ProjectCard > Keyboard focus and selected state > applies hover effect on card
ProjectCard > Keyboard focus and selected state > card can receive focus through launch button
ProjectCard > Keyboard focus and selected state > handles isSelected prop (visual selection)
ProjectCard > Loading states for different operations > handles multiple loading operations correctly
ProjectCard > Loading states for different operations > shows appropriate loading state for each operation
ProjectCard > Edge cases > handles undefined loadingOperations prop
ProjectCard > Edge cases > handles project with special characters in name
ProjectCard > Edge cases > handles very long project paths
ProjectGrid > Grid Layout Rendering > renders project grid with multiple projects
ProjectGrid > Grid Layout Rendering > renders with proper sections when projects exist
ProjectGrid > Recent Projects Section > displays recent projects section when recent projects exist
ProjectGrid > Recent Projects Section > does not display recent projects section when empty
ProjectGrid > Pinned Projects > displays pinned projects in a separate section
ProjectGrid > Pinned Projects > shows "All Projects" when no pinned projects exist
ProjectGrid > Empty State > displays empty state when no projects exist
ProjectGrid > Empty State > displays empty state for unpinned section when only pinned projects exist
ProjectGrid > Keyboard Navigation > highlights selected project
testcase.failure: TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'Symbol(computedStyle)') ❯ GlobalWindow.getComputedStyle node_modules/happy-dom/src/window/BrowserWindow.ts:1139:11 ❯ src/components/ProjectGrid.test.jsx:149:29

testcase.name: ProjectGrid > Keyboard Navigation > scrolls selected project into view
ProjectGrid > Responsive Layout > uses single column layout on small screens
ProjectGrid > Responsive Layout > uses two column layout on larger screens
testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected 0 to be greater than 0 ❯ src/components/ProjectGrid.test.jsx:231:38

testcase.name: ProjectGrid > Props Passing to ProjectCard > passes correct props to each ProjectCard
ProjectGrid > Props Passing to ProjectCard > correctly calculates global index for projects across sections

failure.message: expected …(6) to have a length of 4 but got 6

testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected …(6) to have a length of 4 but got 6
- Expected + Received
- 4 + 6
❯ src/components/ProjectGrid.test.jsx:283:28

testcase.name: ProjectGrid > Masonry Layout Integration > renders projects in Masonry component
testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected 0 to be greater than 0 ❯ src/components/ProjectGrid.test.jsx:298:40

testcase.name: ProjectGrid > Masonry Layout Integration > applies correct spacing between items

failure.message:
expect(received).toBeInTheDocument()
received value must be an HTMLElement or an SVGElement.

testcase.failure:

received value must be an HTMLElement or an SVGElement.
❯ src/components/ProjectGrid.test.jsx:312:32
